name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-14
title: commit_item second push (commit_sha backfill) can fail leaving item without commit_sha
description: branch_ops.commit_item() does two commits and two pushes: (1) write item.json + commit + push, (2) rewrite item.json with commit_sha + commit + push. If push #2 fails, function raises RuntimeError. The item.json on origin is missing commit_sha and there is no retry path. Fix options: backfill before push using git commit-tree, embed retry-with-rebase, or tolerate missing commit_sha in readers.

history.note: Wave 3: BUG-11 cmd_set short-circuits no-op transitions. BUG-14 verified already satisfied (commit_item backfill push already wrapped in _commit_and_push_with_retry by PR #112); new tests lock the invariant.
